data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'real-time capacity adjustment', but the evidence does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for real-time capacity adjustment, yet there is no evidence showing that this requirement has been implemented or validated. Therefore, a gap exists in the evidence supporting this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of real-time capacity adjustment being implemented or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Implement real-time capacity adjustment validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the system can adjust capacity in real-time based on booking data.
